limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI-specific spend, headcount, or capex figures disclosed in the excerpts; named AI team leadership and regulatory compliance cost references support a score of 3 but not higher.

ai_narrative_concreteness: Named use cases (predictive modeling, ML for CGM insights, AI-enabled product functions) are described but deployment status and quantified outcomes are absent; language mixes aspirational ('exploring') with deployment claims ('incorporated'), limiting confidence.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section material is present and contains company-specific AI risk mechanisms (hallucinations impairing decisions, expanded cybersecurity attack surface, competitive acceleration), justifying score 4; no quantified risk figures or named formal AI governance body found in excerpts.
